settings.title: Course Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your course details and settings
settings.publishedHint: Make this course visible to students

publishDialog.title: Publish course to classrooms
publishDialog.description: Choose classrooms that should receive this course version. Publishing creates an immutable snapshot of your topics and lessons, then opens student access through course deliveries.
publishDialog.loadError: Could not load classrooms. Try again.
publishDialog.emptyClassrooms: No classrooms available. Create a classroom first, then publish this course.

archiveDialog.title: Archive course version
archiveDialog.description: Archived versions are no longer active. All learning progress stays available.
archiveDialog.empty: There are no published versions right now.

versionStatus.multipleClassrooms: {{classroom}} and {{count}} more are learning with it

archiveDialog.activeClassroomWarning: Archive only when the classroom is finished.

blockReasons.latestPublished: Cannot be archived while it is the newest version.

toasts.versionSuccessDescription: The course version is no longer active. Learning progress stays intact.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete course. Please try again.
errors.publishStatusFailed: Failed to update publish status. Please try again.

toasts.saveSuccessDescription: Your course details have been updated.
toasts.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
toasts.deleteFailed: Failed to delete course. Please try again.
toasts.publishStatusFailed: Failed to update publish status. Please try again.
toasts.publishSuccessDescription: Version {{version}} is live in {{count}} classroom(s). Students in those classrooms can access this snapshot.
toasts.offlineSuccessDescription: {{count}} delivery/deliveries are hidden from students and can be restored later.
toasts.offlineFailed: Could not take the course offline. Please try again.
toasts.onlineSuccessDescription: {{count}} delivery/deliveries are visible to students again.
toasts.onlineFailed: Could not restore the course online. Please try again.

settings.themeHint: Choose the default course background when no custom image is used.

liveCourse.title: Live course
liveCourse.description: What students currently get from the latest published version.
liveCourse.offlineDescription: Students cannot see this course right now. The delivery can be restored online later.
liveCourse.emptyDescription: Publish this course to a classroom to create the first live snapshot.

draftChanges.title: Draft changes
draftChanges.description: Unpublished edits compared to the live snapshot.

releasePanel.title: Release
releasePanel.description: See what changed since students last received this course.
releasePanel.firstPublishDescription: Choose which classrooms should get this course. Students only see what you publish to their classroom.
classroomImpactPoints: Students in selected classrooms will see your updates after you publish.
You choose which classrooms get the update in the next step.
Classrooms you skip keep the current version. You can't undo a publish, but nothing changes for classrooms you don't select.

publishUpdateDialog.title: Which classrooms should get this update?
publishUpdateDialog.description: Students in the classrooms you select will see your latest changes right away. Other classrooms keep learning with what they already have.
publishUpdateDialog.descriptionMajor: You added or removed topics or lessons. Select the classrooms that should receive this larger update. Other classrooms stay on the current version.

major.title: Publish structural changes?
major.description: Topics or lessons were added, removed, or reordered. You'll choose which classrooms receive this update next.
major.impactTitle: What this means for your classrooms
impactPoints: Will my students see this immediately? Yes — in the classrooms you select in the next step.
Which classrooms get the update? Only the ones you choose. Everyone else keeps the current version.
Can I undo this? No — but classrooms you don't select are not affected.

page.lessonsForTopicDescription: Explore the available lessons for this topic

emptyState.title: Course cannot be found
emptyState.description: Please reload the page or contact the institution or course admin.

emptyTopics.title: Add a new topic
emptyTopics.description: No topic exists yet. Use the input field and click the plus button.

emptyCourse.title: Create your first course
emptyCourse.description: Use the <0></0> command in the command bar to create a new course.

emptyLessons.title: Add your first lesson
emptyLessons.description: Use the fields above and click Create lesson to add a new lesson.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.description: You might lose changes if you switch tab or leave the page.

history.title: Version history
history.description: Every published snapshot of this course, newest first. Draft edits are not shown here.
history.timelineHint: Newest versions appear at the top. Expand a row to preview the topic and lesson tree students received.

changeSummary.noStructuralChanges: No structural changes from the previous version

empty.title: No published versions yet
empty.description: Publish this course from Settings to create the first immutable snapshot.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load version history. Try again.

analytics.placeholder: Course analytics will be available soon.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Topic
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search topics by title or description...
Search courses by title or description...

published.emptyTree: This published version has no topics yet.
published.loadError: Could not load the published course snapshot.
published.noPublishedVersion: This course has no published version yet.
published.lessonNotFound: This lesson is not part of the selected published version.
published.topicNotFound: This topic is not part of the selected published version.

gamesSection.title: Games
gamesSection.emptyDescription: Publish a game from Game Studio and link it to this course to show it here.

releaseReview.title: Review changes
releaseReview.subtitleNoLive: Compare your draft against the live snapshot.
releaseReview.loadError: Could not load draft and live data for review.
releaseReview.emptyDescription: Your draft matches the live snapshot. Edit the course to create new changes.
releaseReview.liveVsDraftHint: Live v{{version}} on the left, current draft on the right.
releaseReview.selectChangeHint: Select a change from the list to compare live and draft.

liveStatus.notPublishedTitle: Not yet in a published version
liveStatus.notPublishedDescription: This lesson is only in your draft workspace until you publish the course.
liveStatus.inLiveDescription: Students in delivered classrooms see this lesson from the published snapshot.
liveStatus.unpublishedDescription: Publishing is required for students to see your latest edits.

empty.noFollowsDescription: Follow a teacher to request access to their courses.
empty.pendingOnlyDescription: Your requests are waiting for teacher approval.
empty.noAcceptedDescription: Your followed teachers have not accepted a request yet.
